name: Houston Golf Simulators
about: Houston Golf Simulators is a dedicated indoor golf facility offering a high-tech simulation experience for golfers of all skill levels. The venue provides multiple simulator bays equipped with advanced launch monitor technology, catering to both casual players and serious golfers looking to practice or play virtual rounds. With a focus on convenience and accessibility, it offers flexible booking options and a welcoming environment for groups, individuals, and corporate events looking for a golf-themed outing with food and drink options available.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced launch monitor technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Flexible booking options for individuals and groups
On-site food and drink options for a complete outing experience
Multiple simulator bays allowing for simultaneous play
Welcoming environment suitable for both casual and serious golfers

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and food service available
Full bar service with cocktails and beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site, but you are welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round takes approximately 1-2 hours depending on simulator wait times and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is primarily geared toward adults, but families with older children are welcome. Contact the venue for specific policies.
